events.text:
{
  "decision": "needs_more_info",
  "risk": "medium",
  "work_stage": "in-progress",
  "component_conditions": [],
  "percent_complete": 10,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.8,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Pre-task photos show guards and access control in place, but no evidence of test pressure calculation, test medium specification, or pressure gauge calibration status.",
    "Daily briefing form is signed, but no active exposure is visible, which is inconsistent with an in-progress pressure test where the system should be under pressure.",
    "Reference to ASME B31.3 §345 is noted, but no documentation confirms compliance with required test pressure (typically 1.5x design pressure) or hold time."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Verify test pressure calculation and ensure it meets ASME B31.3 §345 requirements.",
    "Confirm test medium (e.g., water, air) and ensure appropriate safety measures for the medium are in place.",
    "Check calibration certificates for all pressure gauges and ensure they are within valid date.",
    "Confirm that the system is actually under test pressure and that exclusion zone is actively enforced.",
    "Review test procedure and ensure a competent person is continuously monitoring the test."
  ],
  "rationale": "The scenario describes pre-task conditions (guards, access control, briefing) but labels the work stage as 'in-progress'. For a pressure test to be in-progress, the system should be pressurized, yet no active exposure is visible. This discrepancy, combined with missing critical documentation (test pressure, medium, gauge calibration), means the safety of the test cannot be confirmed. ASME B31.3 §345 requires specific test pressures and procedures; without evidence these are met, the work cannot be passed. More information is needed to verify compliance and safety.",
  "references": [
    "ASME B31.3 §345.4.2 (Test pressure)",
    "ASME B31.3 §345.2.3 (Examination of equipment)",
    "ASME B31.3 §345.2.5 (Test records)"
  ]
}
